arm: raw-read de-novo antigen axis (within Gide, n=30)

leakage_check.verdict: PASS — permuted AUROC collapses to ~0.29, observed p=0.005; fold-contained pipeline has no leakage

cv_scheme_sensitivity.verdict: ROBUST — LOO and repeated 5-fold agree within 0.01

panel_definition_sensitivity.verdict: ROBUST — every individual antigen gene 0.79-0.88; result not driven by one gene or panel choice

interpretation: The within-Gide de-novo antigen signal is genuine and robust (no CV leakage, stable across CV scheme and panel definition). This makes the cross-cohort failure the substantive finding: a robust WITHIN-cohort effect that does not transfer to either held-out cohort, and that is largely explained by immune infiltration (rho=0.77). The rigor is what turns an over-optimistic n=12 AUROC=1.0 into a defensible, publishable negative.
